nasb.text: She said to them, “Go to the hill country, so that the pursuers will not happen upon you, and hide yourselves there for three days until the pursuers return. Then afterward you may go on your way.”

esv.text: And she said to them, “Go into the hills, or the pursuers will encounter you, and hide there three days until the pursuers have returned. Then afterward you may go your way.”

cnv.text: 她對他們二人說：“你們要到山上去，免得追趕的人遇上你們；你們要在那裡躲藏三天，等追趕的人回城，然後你們才可以走你們的路。”

ccb.text: 并对他们说：“你们往山上去，免得被追捕的人发现。你们要在那里躲三天，等追捕的人回城以后才可以走。”
